theme_and_archetype.vibe: Authoritative, minimal, high-end editorial meets precise tech. Avoids standard AI aesthetics (no purple/teal, no Inter).

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large display numbers
headings.weight_strategy: Prefer font-light or font-normal to create an editorial, un-rushed feel. Use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, chat messages, UI elements

rules.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for all text. Primary accent is used strictly for CTAs, active states, and focus rings. Do not use gradients.
rules.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift to a slightly lighter/darker hue of the active state. E.g., hover:bg-[#003BCC] in light mode.

spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 to p-8 internally for all bordered containers.

grid_system.marketing: Asymmetric bento grids, mixing span sizes (col-span-full, col-span-4). Never fill 100% perfectly without tension.
grid_system.dashboard: Control Room Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Strict hierarchy.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, chat bubbles (except user messages which can be right-aligned), and lists. Optical alignment prioritized over strict geometry.

surface_strategies.global_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px to 4px). Sharp, precise tech feel.
surface_strategies.shadows: Remove default shadows. Use 1px solid borders to define hierarchy instead.
surface_strategies.nav_header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F8F6]/70 in light, bg-[#0F1014]/70 in dark) with a 1px delicate bottom border.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders. Hover states get a slight border color darkening, no shadow lift.

libraries: shadcn/ui (heavily customized for sharp edges and typography)
components_and_interactions.buttons: Sharp corners, solid colors. No gradients.
components_and_interactions.inputs: Flat, 1px border. Focus state must use a crisp 2px primary accent ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0047FF]).
components_and_interactions.motion: Subtle. Fast transitions (150ms-200ms ease). No bouncy effects.

pages_instructions.landing: Hero section must feature the minimalist architectural image. Overlay max 30% black if used as background, but preferred as an asymmetrical side-by-side or bento item. Bold H1 in Serif, Mono subtext. Clear Sign In/Up CTAs.
pages_instructions.auth: Single clean card, left aligned. Google OAuth button flat with a subtle border. Email/password with crisp inputs.
pages_instructions.chat: Left sidebar for history, border-r separated. Main area clean. Input fixed at bottom with 1px border. User message: light gray/dark gray block. Bot message: transparent block with Mono typography. Deep-link button to 'Response Detail' on hover of bot message.
pages_instructions.response_detail: A focused, distraction-free reading mode for a single chat response. Wide margins, large serif headings inside the response if applicable, clean mono body.
pages_instructions.dashboard: Bento layout. Metrics (Total chats, questions), Mini chart (use Recharts, styling with brand colors). File list must look like a precise data table.
pages_instructions.file_upload: Drag and drop zone with dashed border (border-dashed border-2). List of uploaded files with clear delete (trash icon) action.

hero_background.description: Minimalist white concrete building. Use for landing page hero section.

sponsor_logo_1.description: Abstract logo design. Use in 'Trusted By' section on landing page.

sponsor_logo_2.description: Abstract geometric circles logo. Use in 'Trusted By' section on landing page.

user_avatar.description: Professional portrait for user avatar placeholder.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
